title: Mining World
description: Adds a cave dimension to the game
body:
Tired of looking for caves in the overworld? This mod adds a new dimension that is just caves.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1342275c01a060aae3e6e7f680e78263b38b86cb_0.webp)

Create a portal once you have silk touch and collect ores.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10c1ad3dbff200505feb6b3b375d0a38e8eb1dda.png)

Light it using a diamond pickaxe.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c88e85b22d7ff32cca88858a0bfe0cde7fc26060.gif)
